Magnesium Glycinate Complex

Athletic Greens

Premium chelated magnesium for optimal absorption. Supports restful sleep, muscle recovery, and nervous system function.

Supplement Facts

Serving Size: 2 Capsules

Servings Per Container: 60

Calories: 0

Magnesium (as Magnesium Glycinate): 400mg - 95% Daily Value

Vitamin B6 (as Pyridoxine HCl): 10mg - 588% Daily Value

Other Ingredients

Hypromellose (vegetable capsule), Microcrystalline Cellulose, Magnesium Stearate, Silicon Dioxide

Allergen Information

Free from: Gluten, Dairy, Soy, Nuts, Eggs, Fish, Shellfish

Manufactured in a GMP-certified facility.

  • Magnesium Glycinate 400mg
  • Vitamin B6 10mg
  • Hypromellose
  • Microcrystalline Cellulose
  • Magnesium Stearate
  • Silicon Dioxide
